feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What to consider when selling self-developed Fiori applications?
entry.content:
I am an experienced full stack developer working as an employee with large S/4HANA systems. I developed an fiori app (including a RAP backend) that i want to sell to different companies. It will run on S/4HANA On-Premise and Private Cloud. I don´t want to use the SAP Store but instead promote it via my network and sell it directly.

What do i need to consider when doing so?

As far as I understand it, selling a self-built Fiori app is not really different from selling development services. In both cases, SAP technologies (SAPUI5, RAP, ABAP, ...) are being used and the application always runs on customer systems which are licensed SAP systems.

I already got in contact with the SAP Partner Support, but they weren´t able to give me a clear answer. They only gave information regarding the partner program, but not if it is actually necessary in my case or what options i have as a one-person company.

entry.title: How to define the "data-sap-ui-resource-roots" of OPA qunit test for MTA project (Fiori freestyle)
entry.content:
Hi,

We are building a testing modules for existing full stack SAP UI5 project, our project structure looks like this..

project
-app
--node_modules
--webapp
---myAppInst
----controller
----views
----resources(my question is here)
----test
------Test.qunit.js
----manifest
---xs-app.json
---package.json
-db
-srv
-xs-security.json
-node_modules
-package.json

i found SAPUI5 and OPENUI5 is using different resources folder, like the sap/ui/test modules,  when i tried to install the modules, files were created in my node_modules folder, but when i running the Test.qunit.html, it is always referring to the resources folder. Therefore, to make it work, i copied the openUI module file from node_modules to /webapp/myAppInst/resource folder. 

here is my Test.qunit.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
	
	<!-- src="../../../../node_modules/@openui5/sap.ui.core/src/sap/ui/test/starter/runTest.js" -->
	<meta charset="utf-8">
	<script
	src="../resources/sap/ui/test/starter/runTest.js"
		data-sap-ui-resource-roots='{
			"test-resources.myAppInst": "./"
		}'
	></script>
</head>
<body class="sapUiBody">
	<div id="qunit"></div>
	<div id="qunit-fixture"></div>
</body>
</html>

But after that, the qunit test journey having following error, looks like the qunit test is looking up all the UI5 modules from my resources folder, instead the node_modules folder

Unable to load the component with the name: myAppInst
Failure in Opa check function
Exception thrown by the testcode:'Error: Error while waiting for promise scheduled on flow, details: ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/m/library.js' from ../resources/sap/m/library.js: script load error
ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/m/library.js' from ../resources/sap/m/library.js: script load error
    at we (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:6833)
    at ge.failWith (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:4709)
    at HTMLScriptElement.i (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:10686)
Caused by: Error: script load error
    at HTMLScriptElement.i (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:10728)
Error: Error while waiting for promise scheduled on flow, details: ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/m/library.js' from ../resources/sap/m/library.js: script load error
ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/m/library.js' from ../resources/sap/m/library.js: script load error
    at we (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:6833)
    at ge.failWith (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:4709)
    at HTMLScriptElement.i (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:10686)
Caused by: Error: script load error
    at HTMLScriptElement.i (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/ui5loader.js:6:10728)
    at oOptions.check (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/Opa.js:677:12)
    at Opa5._executeCheck (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/Opa5.js:1278:26)
    at oOptionsPassedToOpa.check (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/Opa5.js:820:18)
    at fnClass.<anonymous> (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/Opa.js:591:37)
    at opaCheck (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/Opa.js:54:18)
    at wrappedCallback (http://localhost:5001/myAppInst/webapp/resources/sap/ui/test/autowaiter/_timeoutWaiter.js:120:17)'

can anyone give some suggestion?

entry.title: BAS deploy UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using BAS to deploy a own developed SAP Fiori App to a backend system. (ECC + gateway in one system)

Deployment goes well, even if there are errors in the logs. (so cannot really complain about that)

but... when i change something in the frontend and want to redeploy i get a success messages saying its ok i can see the changes in the transport have run all refresh programs as your suppost to nut the changes do not take effect. i have also tried to undeploy and it gets "deleted". deploying under same name just give me the old version (that was suposibly deleted) even though depolyment was a success.

The only way to get the new app to deploy with the new content is to deploy under a different name. 

this is really not a solution 😕

has anyone had the same problem who found out what i am doing wrong?

It is a normal Fiori freestyle APP not using elements

br Lisa

entry.title: Customising fiori applications by coding
entry.content:
So I want to write add a code in existing fiori app called "Manage assignements" wherein a button is to be desabled after reading a input screen and if the input screen matches a particular value. This code is working in the console in inspect tab at runtime. 

What we want to achive is to integrate this javascript code to the fiori app itself by default. Is it possible? What efforts are required?

 

(function() {
    function disableButtonIfConditionMet() {
        var inputElement = document.getElementById("application-DataSetMatchingAssignment-manage-component---worklist--smartFilterbar-filterItemControl_BASIC-DISP_GROUP-inner");
        var buttonElement = document.getElementById("application-DataSetMatchingAssignment-manage-component---worklist--btnAssign");
 
        if (inputElement && buttonElement) {
            if (inputElement.value === "1520 (Trading Partner balance)") {
                buttonElement.disabled = true;
            } else {
                buttonElement.disabled = false;
            }
        }
    }
 
    // Run the function initially
    disableButtonIfConditionMet();
 
    // Set an interval to run the function every second
    setInterval(disableButtonIfConditionMet, 1000);
})();

 

@SAPSupport SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: RAP validation works in Preview but not in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hello,

Newbie in RAP. I have created a demo app in a sandbox environment.

There is a very basic validation implemented where a field (Office Space) must start with "FL". This works perfectly well when using the "Preview" functionality from Eclipse. The error message appears and the field is highlighted.

However, after creating a List Report with the standard template from Visual Studio Code, only the generic error appears, not the one related to the field.

Below you can find the definition and implementation:

To be noted that if I remove the %state_area value, the error appears in a popup but the field is still not highlighted.

Without %state_area:

So maybe I misuse the %state_area? I have just used a dummy text "OFFICE_SPACE". Should the values for this field be predefined somewhere?

entry.title: How to set default values in Input elements on the Create Object Page in Fiori UI5
entry.content:
Hi Experts! I am a newbie to Fiori and ABAP RAP.
I want to set default values in some input elements on the Create Object Page in Fiori UI5. How can I do that?

Thank you

entry.title: How Extend and keep the validation the standard fiori Manage purchase Orders app in SAP BAS?
entry.content:
My requirement is to add company code and material as mandatory fields in the Manage purchase order standard fiori app in SAP BAS. If user clicks on "GO" button without any input needs to validate.

I have created adaptation project from BAS and imported the standard app from ABAP repository and opened in Adaptation view.

May i know which option i need to use to keep the validation ?

Please find the attached screenshot and help me.

Thanks

entry.title: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annotation
entry.content:
In my FE object page, I want to make a field clickable to navigate to a second app using Intent-Based Navigation.

My CDS view annotations are:

 

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'AccountingDocument'
@UI.identification: [{ 
    type: #FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, 
    semanticObjectAction: 'displayDocument', 
  }]

 

 

But when I click on the field, it brings up a list of available action links, one of which is the action that I want.

I don't want to show the user the other links, I want it to navigate directly to the Intent specified by the annotations.

In the browser preview, it shows that the correct annotations are loaded:

So why does it not navigate to the intended target instead of bringing up a list of actions?

Thanks

entry.title: Is output print preview button available in Manage Sales Order V2 App?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using the Manage Sales Order Version 2 app in Fiori to create and modify sales orders. However, we do not see an option for the Output Print Preview button in this app. Does this app support this functionality by default? If not, is it possible to add this button? Are there any additional configurations or settings required to enable this feature?

entry.title: SAP RAP/Fiori Elements Increase Visible Items on Object Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a managed RAP application with a child entity rendered as a table on the object page. By default the RAP framework displays only 5 items in the table. Is there a way I can have more items in one screen? I've tried enabling the full screen function through BAS during deployment and unfortunately only 5 items are displayed on the enlarged screen as well. I'm assuming this would be a common requirement and SAP would have given a way to deal with this. Suggestions please. We are on S/4HANA 2022.

Best Regard,

Saurabh

entry.title: ICMR - Manage Assignments column "Up to Now (YTD)" not working
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm currently testing the Manage Assignments app. The client only wants to analyze the cumulative values during the year between the leading unit and the trading partner. Therefore, we made only the "Up to Now (YTD)" column available, which, according to SAP, "Shows the aggregated amounts of the trading unit pairs up to the time of the execution of the report. This incorporates any new postings detected since the last matching run."

Shouldn't the values, on that specific column, on the period of December, aggregate the value from January to December? 
In my case, when I filter the values to 012.2024 period/fiscal year, the Leading Unit values seem to be only from November and December.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements/RAP Table Control on Object Page freezes randomly
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based draft-enabled Fiori app with a table control rendered on the object page for the child entity. I'm facing a strange problem where the table control freezes randomly while scrolling or entering values in quick succession. There are no backend calls pending. So, its definitely the UI5 component. Everything works well again if I refresh the page. Interestingly, this happens in our QA system and not in Dev. The table control just goes into the loading state infinitely with the rest of the app being functional at the same time. I've no idea what's going on. No errors in the console or the network tab. Please suggest. We are on S/4HANA 2022

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Attachments uploaded to My Inbox does not get saved in backend
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have activated standard My Inbox application. However the upload and send email functionality doesnt work. 

The upload functionality gives a Message attachment is uploaded, however the attachments are not saved.If I refresh the view it goes away. I checked the network call, no call is going to backend either.

My Inbox version activated is 2.2.18.

Please help me with this issue

entry.title: How to properly hide a custom column in a Fiori Elements app with OData V4?
entry.content:
Dear Fiori experts, I hope you can help me with the problem I'm facing.

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using Flexible Programming Model that we're trying to have as much metadata-driven as possible. OData interface is V4. One of my tasks is to implement a custom column with quite sophisticated set of microchartbars, therefore, I'm doing it on frontend by using CDS as my source of data. No problems so far, I've implemented this custom column in my manifest and custom xml template:

My problem is that its availability has to be dependent of another criterion, such as whether or not a user has some particular authorization. This authorization check is done on backend via custom entity and is exposed as an entity set in my OData V4 service, which I read in the onInit method in my List Page controller extension. Unfortunately, I have no idea how to hide this custom column completely if authority check fails. My best bet so far was to use .setIgnoredFields method in .onBeforeRendering method in my List Page controller extension, but for some reason setIgnoredFields works only with columns that come from backend (Plant, Material, etc.), but it totally ignores if I put there my custom column name, no matter what. In the below example it will hide Plant column entirely, but leaves ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn column.

I tried "ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", "DataField::

ComponentsSummaryIndicatorColumn", etc. - no effect. What am I doing wrong and how to do it properly?

I also tried to use all sorts of expression bindings for "availability" in the manifest, but it seems this property is immune to it...

I appreciate every bit of help.

entry.title: UI5 - Failed to load 'sap/uxap/ObjectPageLayout.js'
entry.content:
Hello, I'm currently doing a UI5 course and I've encountered a problem with sap.uxap library in this chapter . I used code provided in the course and I'm trying to use sap.uxap elements in Detail.view.xml

 

<mvc:View controllerName="student02.com.sap.training.ux402.listdetail.ux402listdetail.controller.Detail"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:ux="sap.uxap"
    xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout">
    <ux:ObjectPageLayout id="objectPageLayout">
        <ux:headerTitle>
            <ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle id="objectPageDynamicHeader">
                <ux:expandedHeading>
                    <Title
                        id="title1"
                        text="{Carrname}"
                        level="H2"/>
                </ux:expandedHeading>
            </ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
        </ux:headerTitle>
        <ux:headerContent>
            <FlexBox wrap="Wrap" id="flexBox">
                <Avatar id="avatar" src="sap-icon://flight"/>
                <layout:VerticalLayout id="verticalLayout1" class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Label id="label1" text="{Carrid}"/>
                    <Label id="label2" text="{Url}"/>
                </layout:VerticalLayout>
            </FlexBox>
        </ux:headerContent>
        <ux:sections>
            <ux:ObjectPageSection id="objectPageSection">
                <ux:ObjectPageSubSection id="objectPageSubSection1">
                    <Table id="table" headerText="{i18n>tableHeaderText}" items="{to_Connection}" 
                           noDataText="{i18n>tableNoDataText}">
                        <columns>
                            <Column id="column1">
                                <Text id="text1" text="{i18n>idColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                            <Column id="column2">
                                <Text id="text2" text="{i18n>cityFromColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                            <Column id="column3">
                                <Text id="text3" text="{i18n>cityToColumnText}"/>
                            </Column>
                        </columns>
                        <items>
                            <ColumnListItem id="columnListItem">
                                <cells>
                                    <Text id="text4" text="{Carrid}"/>
                                    <Text id="text5" text="{Cityfrom}"/>
                                    <Text id="text6" text="{Cityto}"/>
                                </cells>
                            </ColumnListItem>
                        </items>
                    </Table>
                </ux:ObjectPageSubSection>
            </ux:ObjectPageSection>
        </ux:sections>
    </ux:ObjectPageLayout>
</mvc:View>

 

Then, when I click on the button that routes to this view I get an error in the browser 

I also tried to access resources link from which ObjectPageLayout.js should be accessed and there is nothing in the uxap repository ( https://port8080-workspaces-ws-clgqm.us10.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/resources/sap )

Does this mean that the error is on the side of API and not in my project?

Thanks in advance for responses.

Michal

entry.title: Blank Screen when extending the project using SAP Web IDE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I tried to extend a standard fiori app (Display Vendor Line Items) thru sap web ide, but unfortunately im getting an error that says : ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js' from /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/FIN_VEN_LITS/sap/fin/arp/lib/lineitems/library.js: 404 - Not Found

Here is the file, after creating a new extension project;



after running the extensible pane, it showing blank screen. anyone help me please. thank you.

entry.title: FIORI listing of reports
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are thinking of re-building some BW reports in FIORI using CDS views. Since we want to avoid issuing a individual FIORI tile for each report, is there a process documented on ways to group list of reports based on department or category? 

For e.g. a folder structure like

Finance>P&L> (all the list of reports - standard and custom made for FIORI reporting. So no FIORI tiles for reports , just a location where end user will get a report inventory list that shows all titles of reports that can be clicked to render the report.) 

the list of reports should,

1. be dynamic i.e.. should only list reports that are relevant for a particular user. (not only access/authorization but also irrelevant reports should not be visible).

2. Reports should open in browser on clicking the title. (similar to what happens in SAP Analytics cloud).

The reason we don't want to use SAC here , is that these reports are all tabular (originally BEx tabular only reports, no charts)

Regards,

Ratish

entry.title: Fiori Standard App Extensions
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know how the FIORI extension projects are linked back to get their main app ?

And is there such linkage needed to preview the extension projects using live data on BAS ?

Many thanks.

entry.title: SAP S4 Hana Content Federation to SAP Build Workzone | Internal server error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am federating content from S4 Hana 2022 to SAP Build Workzone Standard edition.
I'm able to see the tiles on my site, but when I click on a tile I get blank screen with "Internal Server Error".

Any help will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Visual Studio code fiori application deployment fails with status code 500
entry.content:
Hi, I have a fiori list report that I have created in visual studio code using the fiori generator. I have already connected and configured it to my on-premise (demo21) SAP system. When running "npm run start" the app works as intended. However, when trying to deploy I run "npm run deploy" in which asks me for my credentials, after specifying the credentials I get the following error as seen below:

The target system URL that I have used is from going to transaction SMICM>Go to> Services and is in the form of https://abcdefg.mydomain.com:PortNumber
my ui5.yaml file is as below:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

and my ui5-deploy.yaml is as follows:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Running in debug mode produces the same result and I have followed similar steps detailed in Solved: Problems launching first Fiori App - SAP Community Can someone please advise?
